title: Unique Party 19973 - Iridescent Glitter Spiral Birthday Candles, Pack of 24
features: Pack of 24 Iridescent Glitter Spiral Birthday Candles
Great for any birthday party or milestone celebration

description: Product Description Put a fun twist on a birthday classic with these Iridescent glitter spiral birthday candles. Featuring a cool spiral design and sparkly finish, these cake candles are ready to add charming style to any birthday party. Use them to instantly spruce up your celebration cake, whether it’s a traditional birthday cake or a batch of cupcakes. Safety Warning Standard candle safety guidelines apply, such as keeping candles away from flammable materials, avoiding unattended burning, monitoring burn time, and disposing of remnants properly.
